judge.reason: The primary purpose is to send a WMI 11d scan start command, not to manage reference counts. The only refcount operation (dev_kfree_skb) occurs on the error path to free the skb after allocation failure, which is standard memory cleanup, not a refcount get/put/set wrapper. No refcounted object is exposed to the caller.
